_title: ISO 5457 Drawing Area Rules — margins, binding edge, grid references
_note: The drawing area is the trimmed sheet minus the borders. The left margin (25 mm) is the filing/binding edge; other margins are 10 mm. Grid references divide the drawing area into a coordinate system for navigation.

margins._note: All sheet sizes (A0-A4) use these same margin widths

binding_edge._purpose: Allows binding/filing without obscuring drawing content

grid_references._purpose: Subdivide the drawing area into a coordinate grid for navigation (e.g., 'Detail at B-3')

A0._note: Letters A-P on vertical edges, numbers 1-24 on horizontal edges

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption
